query:
=== Recent conversation (last 0 exchanges) ===
[tool: Agent(Architect design review of fix approach) → ]
[Assistant] Two root causes found — the second is notable: `RUST_LOG` is silently ignored (hard-coded `with_env_filter("info")`), so the target-based toggle mechanism needs that fixed first. Now spawning the architect to review the design.
=== End recent conversation ===

entries.title: Implementation checklist items from approved design must be enumerated in the rust-dev spawn prompt — not left implicit in the investigator report
Design corrections made interactively must be explicitly reflected in the rust-dev spawn prompt — GH issue comment updates are not enough
tracing-subscriber with_env_filter(&str) ignores RUST_LOG — use EnvFilter::try_from_default_env() for runtime filter control
How to initialize tracing-subscriber in a new unimatrix-server entry point (tokio_main_*)
ADR: tracing-subscriber initialized with EnvFilter::try_from_default_env() at all server entry points — static &str filter forbidden
